messages.subtitle: Chat with your therapist
messages.empty_patient: No messages yet, say hello to your therapist
messages.empty_therapist_conversation: No messages yet. Send the first message.
messages.empty_therapist_no_selection: Select a patient to start messaging
messages.empty_admin: Messaging is for therapists and patients
messages.empty_admin_description: Direct messages connect patients with their assigned therapist.
messages.send_error: Could not send your message. Please try again.

practice.title: Practice Mini-Games
practice.subtitle: Browse and practice mini-games independently.
practice.no_history: You haven't completed any practice sessions yet.

settings.manage_account_info: Manage your account information and security settings
settings.delete_account_warning_body: Your account and the data tied to it will be deleted. This action is permanent and cannot be undone from the app.
settings.delete_account_bullet_profile: Your profile, email, and login credentials
settings.delete_account_bullet_recordings: All your recordings, transcriptions, and reviewer feedback
settings.delete_account_bullet_reports: Your reports and any clinical notes about you
settings.delete_account_bullet_progress: Your learning path progress, exercises, and assessments
settings.delete_account_keep_body: Keep my recordings (anonymized, unlinked from my identity) to train the speech-therapy AI.
settings.delete_account_delete_body: Delete my recordings along with the rest of my account.
settings.delete_account_confirm_keep_message: Your account will be permanently deleted. Your recordings will be anonymized and retained for model training.
settings.delete_account_confirm_delete_message: Your account and all of your data, including recordings, will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

owner_only_access: Only owners can access this page.
feature_disabled_message: This feature is currently disabled. Contact your administrator to enable it.

errors.insufficient_permissions: You don't have permission to access this page
errors.request_timeout: The server took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.
errors.connection_lost: Connection lost. Check your internet and try again.

footer.tagline: Guiding voices with care and tech

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.ask_anything: Ask me specific questions about your patients, exercises, or reports.
chatbot.tip: 💡 Tip: Ask explicit questions for best results (avoid pronouns like 'they' or 'it')
chatbot.not_connected: Not connected. Please wait or try reconnecting.
chatbot.send_failed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
chatbot.connection_failed: Failed to connect to chat service.
chatbot.max_retries_reached: Unable to connect after multiple attempts. Please refresh the page.

patient_chatbot.input_bar_placeholder: Ask me anything about your speech practice...
patient_chatbot.title: Stuttering Support Assistant
patient_chatbot.ask_anything: Ask me anything about stuttering, coping strategies, or general questions.
patient_chatbot.not_connected: Not connected. Please wait or try reconnecting.
patient_chatbot.send_failed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
patient_chatbot.connection_failed: Failed to connect to chat service.
patient_chatbot.max_retries_reached: Unable to connect after multiple attempts. Please refresh the page.
patient_chatbot.tip: 💡 Tip: Ask about stuttering types, coping strategies, or famous people who stutter

cookie_consent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site usage. By accepting, you agree to our use of analytics cookies.

no_results_filters_description: Try adjusting your filters or search criteria

learning_path.dashboard_subtitle: Monitor and manage your patients' therapy journeys
learning_path.no_path_description: This patient doesn't have a learning path yet.
learning_path.no_path_description_patient: Your therapist is preparing a personalized program for you. You'll be notified when it's ready.
learning_path.status_explanation: Change the learning path status to control the patient's access.
learning_path.no_exercises: No exercises assigned to this step yet.
learning_path.page_subtitle: Track your progress through your personalized therapy program
learning_path.first_time_hint: Work through each step at your own pace. Your therapist has designed this program specifically for you.
learning_path.therapist_advances_note: Your therapist will open the next step when you're ready.
learning_path.therapist_unlocks_note: This step opens when your therapist advances your journey.
learning_path.completed_description: You've completed your therapy journey. Your dedication to practice has brought you here. Keep up the great work!

acknowledgment.tap_hint: Press Continue to return to your journey

learning_path.step_not_found_description: This step doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
learning_path.exercise_instructions_placeholder: Enter custom instructions for the patient...
learning_path.customize_exercises_hint: Select an exercise to customize for this patient.
learning_path.notes_placeholder: Add notes about this step's progress, challenges, or observations...
learning_path.practicing_waiting_for_review: Nice work! Your therapist will review your progress and open the next step. Feel free to keep practicing in the meantime.
learning_path.patient_complete_note: You're ready to move on , continue to the next step.
learning_path.patient_ready_status: Your therapist has approved this step. Continue when you're ready.
learning_path.scenario_practice_description: Practice your techniques in a realistic AI-powered conversation scenario.
learning_path.no_video_description: Your therapist will add a video for this exercise. Check back later.
learning_path.completed_can_practice: This step is complete. You can continue practicing anytime.
learning_path.practice_with_therapist: Practice this step with your therapist's guidance. They'll mark it complete when you're ready to move on.
learning_path.recording_upload_failed: Your recording could not be saved. Please try submitting again.
learning_path.recording_too_large: The recording is too large to upload. Please record a shorter clip.
learning_path.recording_too_small: The recording came out empty. Please record again for at least a second.
learning_path.pending_upload_banner_title: You have a recording that didn't upload
learning_path.pending_upload_banner_body: Retry the upload when you have a stable connection. You'll need to complete the exercise again to finalize your submission.
learning_path.pending_upload_resume_success_body: Record the exercise again to finalize your submission.
learning_path.pending_upload_resume_failure_body: Try again once you're on a stable connection.
learning_path.pending_upload_discard_confirm_body: Your unsent recording will be permanently deleted from this device.
learning_path.exercise_submitted_info: Your therapist can review this · Practice again anytime

step_review.title: Review , {{stepTitle}}
step_review.no_attempts_description: This step hasn't been practiced yet.

encouragement.step_4: One step closer to your goals.
encouragement.milestone_3: You should be proud of this.
encouragement.milestone_4: A significant moment in your journey.
encouragement.journey_4: Your hard work has brought you here.

learning_path.exercises_up_to_date: Exercises are already up to date
learning_path.add_exercises_prompt: Use the Add Exercise button below to create one.
learning_path.all_exercises_hidden_notice: All exercises are hidden. The patient won't see any exercises for this step.
learning_path.all_exercises_hidden_warning: This is the last visible exercise. Hiding it means the patient won't see any exercises for this step.
learning_path.complete_impact: The patient will see a completion message. This marks the entire learning path as finished.
learning_path.confirm_batch_complete_body: This will mark {{count}} steps as completed and advance the patient's journey. This action affects multiple steps at once.
learning_path.confirm_batch_skip_body: This will skip {{count}} steps. The patient can still return to them later if reopened.
learning_path.confirm_batch_unlock_body: This will allow the patient to complete {{count}} steps on their own. Steps not yet reached will be allowed automatically when they become current.
learning_path.confirm_complete_no_attempts_body: "{{step}}" has no recorded practice attempts. Are you sure you want to mark it as complete?
learning_path.confirm_reopen_body: This will reopen "{{step}}" so the patient can practice it again.
learning_path.confirm_skip_body: This will skip "{{step}}" and move the patient to the next step. The patient can still return to it later if reopened.
learning_path.confirm_skip_to_body: All steps before "{{step}}" will be marked as skipped. The patient will continue from this step.
learning_path.created_description: The learning path has been started.
learning_path.exercise_visible_hint: When off, this exercise is hidden from the patient
learning_path.exercises_built_in: Exercises for this step are built into the curriculum.
learning_path.confirm_allow_completion_current_body: The patient will be able to complete "{{step}}" on their own and advance to the next step.
learning_path.confirm_allow_completion_locked_body: The patient will be able to complete "{{step}}" on their own when they reach it. Completing the step will advance them to the next one.
learning_path.pause_impact: The patient will see a paused message and won't be able to practice until resumed.
learning_path.paused_description: Your therapist has paused your program. This is completely normal,sometimes a short break is part of the process.
learning_path.paused_reassurance: Your progress is saved and waiting for you.
learning_path.reset_defaults_hint: Undo your changes and restore the original exercise content
learning_path.resume_impact: The patient will regain access to their journey and can continue practicing.
learning_path.step_already_unlocked: Completion is already allowed for this step
learning_path.step_unlocked: Patient can now complete this step
learning_path.title: Learning Path
learning_path.revert_to_locked_confirm_body: This will remove "{{step}}" from the patient's active path. The step will become locked and the patient won't be able to access it until they reach it again through normal progression.
learning_path.video_url_invalid: This doesn't appear to be a valid URL.
learning_path.video_url_provider_warning: This doesn't look like a video link. Try YouTube, Vimeo, Loom, or a direct video file.
learning_path.no_video_description_preview: No video has been assigned to this exercise yet.
learning_path.preview_banner: Preview Mode , Interactions are local only, nothing will be saved.
learning_path.preview_exercise_done: This is what the patient sees after submitting.
learning_path.preview_load_error: Could not load step preview. Please try again.
learning_path.preview_recording_local: This recording is local to this preview session and will be lost if you refresh the page.
learning_path.preview_scenario_unavailable: AI scenario practice is not available in preview mode.
learning_path.waiting_for_unlock_description: Your therapist will unlock your next step soon. Your progress so far is saved below.
learning_path.exercise_load_error: Something went wrong loading this exercise. Please refresh the page to try again.

questionnaire.encouragement: Take your time. There are no right or wrong answers.
questionnaire.milestone_description: You've completed {{title}}. Take a moment to reflect on your progress.

milestone.confidence: How confident do you feel about the techniques you practiced in this milestone?
milestone.comfort: How comfortable are you applying these techniques in daily conversations?
milestone.reflection: What has been the most helpful part of this milestone for you?

questionnaire.confirm_close: You have unsaved answers. Are you sure you want to close?

try_again_description: Something went wrong. Please try again.
no_patients_description: You don't have any patients assigned. Invite patients to get started.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: We're sorry, but something unexpected happened. Our team has been notified and we're working to fix the issue.
error_boundary.contact_support: If the problem persists, please contact support at

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

microphone.generic: Could not access your microphone. Please check your settings and try again.

camera.no_device: No camera found. Please connect a camera and try again.
camera.generic: Could not access your camera. Please check your settings and try again.

device.no_media_devices: Your browser does not support media access. Please try a different browser.

device.generic: Could not access your device. Please check your settings and try again.

ios_app: Open the Settings app on your device
android_firefox: Tap the lock icon in the address bar

desktop_safari: In the menu bar, go to Safari > Settings for This Website
desktop_firefox: Click the lock icon in the address bar
desktop_edge: Click the lock icon in the address bar
desktop_chrome: Click the lock icon in the address bar
fallback: Open your browser settings or site permissions

camera.permission_denied: Camera and microphone access was denied. Please check your browser permissions.

microphone.no_device: No microphone found. Please connect one and try again.
